title: Config source: project root vs user .claude (crystalcontext_config.md)
description: Choose where crystalcontext_config.md is loaded from: workspace root (Local) or user profile .claude folder (Global). UI uses two radios; selection persists in globalState; file watcher refreshes on changes.
success_criteria: Two clickable radios appear: Local (project root) and Global (.claude)
Radio labels clearly indicate project vs .claude folder
Extension handles setConfigScope from the webview
Webview posts setConfigScope when the user changes scope
Local scope resolves crystalcontext_config.md under the workspace folder
Global scope resolves crystalcontext_config.md under os.homedir()/.claude
Changing the file on disk triggers reload (_setupConfigWatcher)
loadItems messages include configScope so the UI stays in sync
Dedicated configScope message updates radios when the host loads
Opening/closing workspace folders triggers reload for Local scope
notes: Automated checks are static (extension.js). Manual: verify both paths in EDH with files present; confirm no webview console errors.
